2606.06079.title: SkillComposer: Learning to Evolve Agent Skills for Specification and Generalization
2606.06079.paper_summary: Agent skills, which consist of reusable strategies that guide agent reasoning and action, have shown strong potential for improving model capability at inference time. However, current skill construction methods treat the problem as one-shot extraction, overlooking a fundamental tension: a skill tailored to the specific task fails to transfer, while the abstracted skill often provides insufficient guidance. We attribute this fragility to the absence of explicit mechanisms for skill specification and generalization. To address this gap, we introduce SkillComposer, a framework that decomposes skill construction into three learnable operations: create, improve, and merge. Trained via systematic rejection sampling recipe, SkillComposer enables language models to self-evolve skills at inference time and supports three deployment modes: offline for building generalized libraries, online for task-specific refinement, and hybrid for combining both. Comprehensive experiments on $τ^2$-Bench, LiveCodeBench v6, and AppWorld show that SkillComposer consistently outperforms baselines. Our SkillComposer-4B improves a 27B executor by up to +4.5 on agent tasks and +3.4 on code tasks, while generalizing across domains and task types unseen during training. Analysis reveals that merge and improve address orthogonal quality dimensions and that skill composition is a transferable meta-ability, providing a practical recipe for skill-augmented inference.
2606.06079.paper_summary_zh: 代理技能由可重用的策略組成，這些策略指導代理的推理和行動，顯示出在推理時提高模型能力的強大潛力。<lb/>然而，當前的技能構建方法將問題視為一次性提取，忽視了一個根本的緊張關係：針對特定任務量身定制的技能無法轉移，而抽象的技能往往提供不足的指導。<lb/>我們將這種脆弱性歸因於缺乏明確的技能規範和泛化機制。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們引入了SkillComposer，這是一個將技能構建分解為三個可學習操作的框架：創建、改進和合併。<lb/>通過系統的拒絕採樣配方進行訓練，SkillComposer使語言模型能夠在推理時自我演化技能，並支持三種部署模式：離線用於構建通用庫，線上用於任務特定的細化，以及混合用於結合兩者。<lb/>在$τ^2$-Bench、LiveCodeBench v6和AppWorld上的綜合實驗顯示，SkillComposer始終超越基準。<lb/>我們的SkillComposer-4B在代理任務上將27B執行器的性能提高了最多+4.5，在代碼任務上提高了+3.4，同時在訓練期間未見的領域和任務類型上實現了泛化。<lb/>分析顯示，合併和改進解決了正交的質量維度，技能組合是一種可轉移的元能力，提供了技能增強推理的實用配方。
2606.06079.author: Qi Zhang et.al.
2606.06079.authors: Qi Zhang, Zhaopeng Feng, Xiaonan Shi, Xiaomeng Hu, Chu Liu, Pengjun Xie, Xiaobin Wang, Jieping Ye, Bryan Hooi, Haobo Wang, Junbo Zhao
